cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking for the best title of the passage. The options are A, B, C, D. The passage starts by talking about the London Olympics and how it was a success, particularly in being the "greenest" Games ever. The main focus seems to be on the environmental efforts London made during the Olympics. The first paragraph mentions London winning a gold medal for the greenest Games. Then the article goes on to detail various green initiatives: cleaning up polluted areas, using recycled materials in construction, green building techniques, waste management, water conservation, and promoting public transport. There's also a mention of anti-doping, but that's towards the end and seems to be a minor point compared to the environmental aspects. Looking at the options: A) How to deal with the anti-doping – this is only a small part of the passage, so probably not the main title. B) How to use recycled materials – while recycled materials are discussed, the passage covers more than just that, like green building techniques, waste management, water use, public transport. So B is too narrow. C) London's green games – this seems to encapsulate the overall theme of the passage, which is London's efforts to make the Olympics environmentally friendly. D) London's public transport – public transport
